This report scans the GitHub-native Slack/Telegram channel bridge for workflow-dispatch control risks and prompt-visible mirrored channel-message risk. It reports provider names, workflow metadata, comment IDs, counts, risk codes, severities, and hashes only; channel message bodies, issue bodies, workflow bodies, prompts, provider credentials, and secret values are not included.

### Provider Risk Cards
- kind=`provider` name=`telegram` ingress=`getUpdates polling or long-running gateway lease` gateway=`self-renewing GitHub Actions gateway with durable offset hashes` offset_key=`update_id` thread_key=`chat_id` message_key=`update_id or message_id` required_secret_names=`TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN` risk_findings=`0` risk_max_severity=`none` risk_codes=`none`
- kind=`provider` name=`slack` ingress=`Socket Mode gateway or low-volume conversations polling` gateway=`self-renewing GitHub Actions gateway with durable event hashes` offset_key=`event_id or channel timestamp` thread_key=`channel_id + thread_ts` message_key=`event_id or message timestamp` required_secret_names=`SLACK_APP_TOKEN, SLACK_BOT_TOKEN` risk_findings=`0` risk_max_severity=`none` risk_codes=`none`
- kind=`provider` name=`generic` ingress=`manual workflow_dispatch or tiny external dispatcher` gateway=`optional; external caller can invoke channel-ingest directly` offset_key=`external offset` thread_key=`thread_id` message_key=`message_id` required_secret_names=`none` risk_findings=`0` risk_max_severity=`none` risk_codes=`none`

### Workflow Risk Cards

- kind=`workflow` name=`gateway` path=`.github/workflows/gitclaw-channel-gateway.yml` present=`true` workflow_dispatch=`true` actions_write=`true` issues_write=`true` inputs=`6` required_inputs=`6` sha256_12=`6b46ecf0a6b4` risk_findings=`0` risk_max_severity=`none` risk_codes=`none` line_hashes=`none`
- kind=`workflow` name=`delivery` path=`.github/workflows/gitclaw-channel-delivery.yml` present=`true` workflow_dispatch=`true` actions_write=`false` issues_write=`true` inputs=`6` required_inputs=`6` sha256_12=`33be09897bc2` risk_findings=`0` risk_max_severity=`none` risk_codes=`none` line_hashes=`none`
